email.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid email address
email.disposableBlocked: {{label}} must not use a disposable email provider
email.domainNotAllowed: Email domain '{{domain}}' is not in the allowed list
email.subdomainNotAllowed: Subdomain email addresses are not allowed

personName.boundary: {{label}} must start and end with a letter
personName.maxConsecutive: {{label}} must not repeat the same character more than {{maximum}} times

businessName.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid business name
businessName.boundary: {{label}} must start and end with an alphanumeric character
businessName.maxConsecutive: {{label}} must not repeat the same character more than {{maximum}} times

password.minUppercase: {{label}} must have at least {{minimum}} uppercase characters
password.minLowercase: {{label}} must have at least {{minimum}} lowercase characters
password.minSpecial: {{label}} must have at least {{minimum}} special characters
password.maxUppercase: {{label}} must have at most {{maximum}} uppercase characters
password.maxLowercase: {{label}} must have at most {{maximum}} lowercase characters
password.maxSpecial: {{label}} must have at most {{maximum}} special characters
password.maxConsecutive: {{label}} must not have more than {{maximum}} consecutive identical characters

phone.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid phone number
phone.requireMobile: {{label}} must be a mobile phone number
phone.countryCodeRequired: {{label}} must include a country code prefix
phone.countryBlocked: Phone numbers from '{{country}}' are not allowed
phone.countryNotAllowed: Phone numbers from '{{country}}' are not in the allowed list

website.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid website URL
website.domainNotAllowed: Domain '{{domain}}' is not in the allowed list

url.domainNotAllowed: Domain '{{domain}}' is not in the allowed list

username.boundary: {{label}} must start and end with an alphanumeric character
username.maxConsecutive: {{label}} must not repeat the same character more than {{maximum}} times

postalCode.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid postal code

licenseKey.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid license key

dateTime.noFuture: {{label}} must not be in the future
dateTime.noPast: {{label}} must not be in the past

text.maxConsecutive: {{label}} must not repeat the same character more than {{maximum}} times

country.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid country code
country.notAllowed: Country '{{country}}' is not in the allowed list

currency.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid currency code
currency.notAllowed: Currency '{{currency}}' is not in the allowed list

creditCard.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid credit card number
creditCard.issuerNotAllowed: Card issuer '{{issuer}}' is not in the allowed list

iban.countryNotAllowed: IBANs from '{{country}}' are not in the allowed list

vatNumber.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid VAT number

macAddress.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid MAC address

ipAddress.invalid: {{label}} is not a valid IP address
ipAddress.privateNotAllowed: {{label}} must not be a private IP address

string.minUppercase: {{label}} must have at least {{minimum}} uppercase characters
string.maxUppercase: {{label}} must have at most {{maximum}} uppercase characters
string.minLowercase: {{label}} must have at least {{minimum}} lowercase characters
string.maxLowercase: {{label}} must have at most {{maximum}} lowercase characters
string.minSpecial: {{label}} must have at least {{minimum}} special characters
string.maxSpecial: {{label}} must have at most {{maximum}} special characters
string.onlyAlphanumeric: {{label}} must contain only letters and digits
string.onlyAlphaSpaceHyphen: {{label}} must contain only letters, spaces, and hyphens
string.onlyAlphanumericSpaceHyphen: {{label}} must contain only letters, digits, spaces, and hyphens
string.maxConsecutive: {{label}} must not repeat the same character more than {{maximum}} times
